goldSynthesisSection: Governance & ops / Multi-provider secret / API-key resolution (env-first, vault, placeholder rejection, proxy)

goldSynthesisSection: Governance & ops / Multi-provider secret / API-key resolution (env-first, vault, placeholder rejection, proxy)

goldSynthesisSection: Governance & ops / SSRF guard for remote MCP/connector and ingestion URLs
